name: PR-quality eval gate rejects a grade record whose usefulness value is outside the 1-5 inclusive range
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus/grades && printf '{"pr":1,"graded_useful":true,"usefulness":7}\n' > pr-corpus/grades/p1.json && for i in $(seq 2 20); do printf '{"pr":%d,"graded_useful":true,"usefulness":4}\n' "$i" > pr-corpus/grades/p${i}.json; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/quality-eval.sh" --grades-dir pr-corpus/grades --out pr-corpus/quality-eval.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid usefulness=7' err.txt && grep -q 'pr=1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
